summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MANO Authentication and Investor Registration system. Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All pages load correctly, forms work, CIF validation works, protected routes redirect properly.

minor.issue: Invalid CIF returns 500 instead of 422 - CIF validation is in InvestorRequest model instead of InvestorRegisterRequest model
minor.fix: Move CIF validator from InvestorRequest to InvestorRegisterRequest model for proper FastAPI validation response

ui_bugs.issue: Error toast shows 'Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read' when login fails
ui_bugs.note: This is a minor UX issue - the error is still shown but with a technical message

passed_tests: Frontend: Homepage loads with login/register buttons
Frontend: Login page renders with Google OAuth and email form
Frontend: Register page renders with all form fields
Frontend: Registration flow works - redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Investor Register page renders with CIF validation
Frontend: CIF validation shows error for invalid format
Frontend: Investor registration success shows confirmation
Frontend: Protected routes redirect to login when unauthenticated
action_items: MEDIUM: Move CIF validator from InvestorRequest to InvestorRegisterRequest model in server.py (line 112-119) to return proper 422 validation error instead of 500
LOW: Fix error handling in Login.js to properly parse error response without double-reading body stream
critical_code_review_comments: CIF validation is duplicated - exists in both InvestorRequest (line 103-109) and frontend InvestorRegister.js (line 31-34). Should be in InvestorRegisterRequest for proper API validation
Login.js error handling may be reading response body twice causing 'body stream already read' error
seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing with unique emails (test_auth_* and test_ui_* prefixes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Authentication system uses httponly cookies for session management. Sessions stored in MongoDB user_sessions collection. CIF format: Letter (A-W) + 7 digits + digit/letter(0-9,A-J). Investor documents require 'investor' or 'admin' role. Google OAuth uses Emergent Auth at auth.emergentagent.com.
